headerDisplay: Renders any TRMNL Recipe or Terminus extension as a HomeKit camera. Each entry below becomes one camera accessory.

terminusBaseUrl.title: Terminus base URL
terminusBaseUrl.description: Base URL of a self-hosted Terminus instance (e.g. http://vanessapi.tail9a4f0.ts.net:2300). Only needed if any camera below sets a Terminus extension ID.

terminusEmail.title: Terminus account email
terminusEmail.description: Login email for the Terminus account used to trigger renders. Only needed if any camera below sets a Terminus extension ID.

terminusPassword.title: Terminus account password
terminusPassword.description: Login password for the Terminus account used to trigger renders. Only needed if any camera below sets a Terminus extension ID.

chromiumPath.title: Chromium binary path
chromiumPath.description: Path to a chromium/chromium-browser binary supporting --headless=new --screenshot. Only needed if any camera below sets a Recipe ID. Ignored if Chromium service URL is set.

chromiumServiceUrl.title: Chromium service URL
chromiumServiceUrl.description: Base URL of a docker/chromium-service instance (see the plugin repo) instead of a local Chromium binary -- for hosts where Homebridge itself runs in a container with no working Chromium (e.g. Ubuntu images). Takes precedence over Chromium binary path. Only needed if any camera below sets a Recipe ID.

label.title: Name
label.description: Accessory name shown in the Home app.

terminusExtensionId.title: Terminus extension ID
terminusExtensionId.description: Renders via Terminus: the numeric ID of the Terminus extension to render (visible in its URL, e.g. /extensions/12). Set this or Recipe ID, not both.

recipeId.title: TRMNL Recipe ID
recipeId.description: Renders locally, no Terminus needed: the numeric ID of a TRMNL Recipe (from trmnl.com/recipes.json or a Recipe's URL). Set this or Terminus extension ID, not both.

fieldValues.title: Recipe field values
fieldValues.description: Only used with Recipe ID. Values for the Recipe's custom fields (e.g. an API token or location), keyed by the field's name. Fields left unset here fall back to the Recipe's own default.

screenWidth.title: Screen width (px)
screenWidth.description: Only used with Recipe ID. Rendered image width.

screenHeight.title: Screen height (px)
screenHeight.description: Only used with Recipe ID. Rendered image height.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to trigger a fresh render and refresh the cached snapshot.

streamFps.title: Stream framerate
streamFps.description: Framerate advertised for live view streaming of the (static) rendered frame.
